measurement_note: Size is U, with U users and T = U transactions. Odd-numbered accounts have balance 10001 and qualify; even-numbered accounts have exactly 10000 and exercise the strict boundary. The Accepted join/group query and an independent aggregate-then-join query have an O((U+T) log(U+T)) portable bound. A correct correlated scalar-sum query rescans all transactions for every user, performs O(UT) work, completes all 32/128/512 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 32 users with one transaction each
benchmark: 128 users with one transaction each
benchmark: 512 users with one transaction each
